{{Infobox group
| name = Farstriders
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Farstriders]]' report is expected to be significant.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstriders]] provide reports on peace meetings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstriders]] wrote a report regarding [[Estyr]]'s accusations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
